text.title: AI Feature Incident Runbook Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals from inputs to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for ai-feature-incident-runbook.

decision-tree.root-question: What is the incident's severity + class?

branch.when: severity == P1 AND class in {safety, cost-spike}

conclusion.verdict: KILL — feature flag off, communicate, then debug
ROLLBACK — prompt SHA / model pin to last green
MITIGATE — walk ladder, page if escalating
MONITOR — record incident, schedule fix in normal queue
skip — preconditions in Applies-If not met

text.example: preconditions met → first branch matches → conclusion ref resolves to a rule in 01-core-rules.xml.
